zh.lifeSummary: 當Balderic the Teuton於大約0977年出生在德國時，他的父親Wigerius de Courcy26歲，母親Emma de Roucy28歲。他和Aubrée or Alix de Brionne至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於從1033年到1053年在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Balderic the Teuton于大约0977年出生在德国时，他的父亲Wigerius de Courcy26岁，母亲Emma de Roucy28岁。他和Aubrée or Alix de Brionne至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于从1033年到1053年在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱。

nameMeanings.name: the
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 鄭, possibly based on its Hokkien or Teochew pronunciation, see   Zheng   1.

variants.name: Zheng
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Jian, Yi, Bin, Hong, Hua, Li, Wei, Yong, Ting, Xin, Yan, Hui, Min, Hao, Shen, Da, Quan, Tian, Chong.

Mandarin form of the surname 鄭: from Zheng (鄭), the name of a state (located in part of present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) granted to You, the younger brother of King Xuan of Zhou (reigned 827–782  BC ). The state of Zheng was annexed by the state of Han (located in present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) during the Warring States period (475–221  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Teuton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: unexplained. This surname is also found in Northern Ireland.

en.lifeSummary: When Balderic the Teuton was born about 0977, in Germany, his father, Wigerius de Courcy, was 26 and his mother, Emma de Roucy, was 28. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Aubrée or Alix de Brionne. He died from 1033 to 1053, in Caen, Calvados, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Balderic the Teuton est né environ 0977, à Allemagne, son père, Wigerius de Courcy, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Emma de Roucy, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Aubrée or Alix de Brionne. Il est décédé du 1033 au 1053, à Caen, Calvados, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Balderic the Teuton um 0977 in Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Wigerius de Courcy 26 und seine Mutter Emma de Roucy 28. Er hatte mit Aubrée or Alix de Brionne mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb von 1033 bis 1053 in Caen, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Balderic the Teuton è nato il circa 0977 nel Germania, il suo padre, Wigerius de Courcy, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Roucy, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Aubrée or Alix de Brionne. Morì da 1033 a 1053, nel Caen, Calvados, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Balderic the Teutonが約0977年にドイツで生まれた時，父Wigerius de Courcyは26歳，母Emma de Roucyは28歳であった。彼はAubrée or Alix de Brionneとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼はから1033年まで1053年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスケンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Balderic the Teuton(이)가 대략 0977년 독일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wigerius de Courcy(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Roucy(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Aubrée or Alix de Brionne(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1033년 부터 1053년 까지 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 카이에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Balderic the Teuton nasceu aproximadamente 0977, em Alemanha, seu pai, Wigerius de Courcy, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Roucy, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Aubrée or Alix de Brionne. Ele faleceu de 1033 a 1053, em Caen, Calvados, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Balderic the Teuton родился около 0977 г. в местности Германия, его отцу по имени Wigerius de Courcy было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Roucy, 28. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Aubrée or Alix de Brionne. Он умер с 1033 по 1053 в местности каен, калвадос, норманди, Франция.

sm.about 977–from 1033 to 1053: e tusa o le 0977–mai le 1033 e o'o I le 1053
sm.from 1033 to 1053: mai le 1033 e o'o I le 1053

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Balderic the Teuton nació aproximadamente 0977, en Alemania, su papá, Wigerius de Courcy, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Emma de Roucy, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Aubrée or Alix de Brionne. Murió desde 1033 hasta 1053, en Caen, Calvados, Normandie, Francia.
